heading: Family members serving on advisory committees
label: 1783 Family members serving on advisory committees
text: A committee within the Department of Defense which advises or assists the Department in the performance of any function which affects members of military families and which includes members of military families in its membership shall not be considered an advisory committee under solely because of such membership.section 1001(2) of title 5
notes: Amendments2022— substituted “” for “section 3(2) of the Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.)”.Pub. L. 117–286section 1001(2) of title 5
amendments: Amendments2022— substituted “” for “section 3(2) of the Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.)”.Pub. L. 117–286section 1001(2) of title 5
